author: y4rr
content:
Plan: Fix 5 distribution bugs from Sprint B.3 per GitHub issues #875-#879.

#875 Missing mean() implementations:
- MultivariateNormal: mean = loc (clone)
- LowRankMultivariateNormal: mean = loc (clone)  
- Dirichlet: mean[i] = alpha[i]/sum(alpha), variance[i] = alpha[i]*(alpha0-alpha[i])/(alpha0^2*(alpha0+1))
- Pareto: mean = alpha*xm/(alpha-1) for alpha>1 else inf; variance = xm^2*alpha/((alpha-1)^2*(alpha-2)) for alpha>2 else inf
- VonMises: mean = loc

#876 Independent::sample() shape bug:
- sample(shape) must pass shape++batch_dims to inner distribution
- Fix: pass batch_shape appended to sample_shape when calling base.sample()

#877 Kumaraswamy::entropy() wrong digamma for non-integer b in (0,1):
- Integer loop walks x += 1.0 which steps past b+1 for fractional b
- Fix: replace integer loop with proper asymptotic digamma using shift-then-expand

#878 RelaxedBernoulli::log_prob wrong formula:
- Reference: log(temp) + diff - 2*softplus(diff) - log(x) - log(1-x)
  where diff = logits - logit(x)*temp
- Current impl uses Maddison eq21 direct expansion which gives wrong sign/structure

#879 Multinomial missing mean/variance:
- mean[k] = n * p[k]
- variance[k] = n * p[k] * (1 - p[k])

Then remove cascade_skip calls from conformance tests for all 5.
